name: camera
summary: Camera core: create, init, per-frame view-proj matrix update, angle calc to target. Writes scroll offsets (sCamYaw/sCamVertOffs) to scroll.c globals each frame for background parallax.
functions: cam_create — Alloc Object from pool, set FOV=30°, near=600, far=11000, init Transform hierarchy, set cam_frame_update as callback, call cam_reset_mtx.
cam_init — Reset animation state, set position (0,0,0), lookAt (0,-480,0), default clip planes.
cam_init_pos — Set camera at explicit position (x/y/z) + Y rotation angle. Called by move.c for cinematic camera positions.

cam_frame_update — Main per-frame update: animate model (model_anim_load/tick), compute perspective (guPerspectiveF) + lookAt (guLookAtF), multiply → view-proj matrix, calc angle to target player (atan2_lut, hypot), write sCamYaw/sCamVertOffs to scroll.c globals for background.
cam_calc_angle — Compute yaw angle from player positions with quadrant wrap correction (±2PI). Updated sCamAngleCurr with ratio-based interpolation.
cam_reset_mtx — Reset perspective + lookAt matrices to fixed default (0,0,-2300 looking at origin).

globals.gCamTargetObj: Object* — Camera target (current player). Used by 8 files.
globals.sCamUnkParam: s32 — Unknown param, init 180. Maybe render/scene related.
globals.sCamAngleToTarget: s32 — Current atan2 yaw angle to target player.
globals.sCamPrevAngle: s32 — Previous frame's yaw angle (for delta calc).
globals.sCamVertRatio: f32 — Vertical angle ratio (y-dist / hypot distance).
globals.sCamYaw: s32 — Camera yaw angle (fixed-point). Written to D_80081428 each frame.
globals.sCamVertOffs: s32 — Camera vertical offset. Written to x_6c647b3a each frame.
globals.sCamHeightOffs: s32 — Camera height offset (added to pos/lookAt Y).

open_questions: D_8013C564 / D_8013C57C — unused globals, probably padding.
sCamUnkStruct (D_8013C808, x_43bd08ed) — type needs renaming in common_structs.h.
